author: imaikosuke
description: Always display today's daily note in a side panel. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: imaikosuke
manifest.description: Always display today's daily note in a side panel.
manifest.name: Today Pane

name: Today Pane

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- fix: Handle non-numeric moment tokens in daily note format ([#3](https://github.com/imaikosuke/obsidian-today-pane/pull/3) by [@yacoubb](https://github.com/yacoubb))
- docs: Add compatibility notes for Periodic Notes and Journals

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- fix: Align minAppVersion with Obsidian APIs (requires Obsidian 1.7.2 or newer)
- chore: Address Obsidian plugin linter feedback for Markdown suggestions and daily note parsing

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- feat: Add custom daily note format setting
- feat: Add custom daily note template setting
- feat: Integrate Markdown file suggestion in settings
- feat: Support automatic folder hierarchy creation
- refactor: Streamline template content retrieval
- refactor: Update comments and documentation to English
- fix: Add styles for today pane input fields
- cicd: Add GitHub Actions workflow for automated releases
- chore: Automate version bumping for multiple files
- chore: Standardize release process via .npmrc

releases.author: imaikosuke
releases.description:
# 1.0.3

## Fixes

- fix: Use sentence case for all UI text strings (command names, settings labels)
- fix: Add void operator to handle promises that don't need to be awaited
- fix: Remove plugin ID prefix from command ID (changed from "open-today-pane" to "open")
- fix: Replace HTML heading elements with Obsidian Setting API's setHeading() method
- fix: Remove unnecessary async keywords from functions without await expressions
- fix: Replace deprecated `builtin-modules` package with Node.js built-in `module.builtinModules`
- fix: Update error messages from Japanese to English for consistency

## Refactor

- refactor: Improve settings loading using spread operator instead of Object.assign
- refactor: Enhance command registration and error handling

## Chore

- chore: Add eslint-plugin-obsidianmd for Obsidian plugin best practices
- chore: Enhance ESLint configuration with TypeScript and ObsidianMD plugin support
- chore: Update dependencies and improve code quality checks

## Docs

- docs: Add screenshot and clarify desktop-only functionality in README

releases.author: imaikosuke
releases.description:

fix: Remove the word `obsidian` from `id` in `manifest.json`

releases.author: imaikosuke
releases.description:
# 1.0.1

fix: Improve type safety with TypeScript strict mode

releases.author: imaikosuke
releases.description:
# 1.0.0

feat: automatically display today's daily note in the right sidebar on Obsidian startup
feat: add ribbon icon to manually open today's daily note
feat: add command palette command "Open Today's Note" to manually open today's daily note
feat: automatically create today's daily note from template if it doesn't exist
feat: prevent duplicate opening of the same note if it's already open
feat: add settings tab with auto-open on startup toggle option
